title: Cheezies Gourmet
tagline: Artisan grilled cheese — a real food brand, documented.
description: Cheezies Gourmet is a real artisan grilled cheese concept — menu development, branding, and the story of building a food business from the kitchen up. The portfolio page documents the brand, the menu, and the journey.
story: Cheezies Gourmet came out of a simple obsession: making the best grilled cheese possible, then figuring out what it would take to turn that into a real business. Every sandwich on the menu has a reason for existing.
journey: Cheezies started as a personal project to actually do the thing — not just cook, but build a brand around it. Menu development, naming, pricing, the whole arc of taking a food idea from a home kitchen to something you could hand to a customer. It lives in the portfolio as proof that my relationship with food isn't theoretical — it's in the build.
forWho: Anyone curious about the intersection of culinary craft and brand building — or just really good grilled cheese.

detailedSpecs.architecture: Brand and menu documentation — no code stack.
keyPatterns: Menu development with intentional flavour pairing
Brand identity — name, voice, and visual direction
Pricing and positioning for a real food concept
